name: consensus
description: Consensus refine and evaluate skills for multi-peer deliberation.

interface.shortDescription: Refine drafts and evaluate artifacts with two-peer deliberation.
interface.longDescription: Consensus deliberation skills for refining markdown drafts or evaluating artifacts against rubrics with multiple AI peers and an audit trail.
defaultPrompt: Use Consensus Refine to improve this markdown draft, or Consensus Evaluate to judge an artifact against a rubric.

release_checklist: Verify exec permission shape and skill path syntax against the Codex runtime through local plugin installation before v0.1 tagging.
